languages.text: {n}Руки вивисектора сменили короткие уродливые культи. Заметив ваш взгляд, мужчина невольно ежится и спешит отвести взгляд.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Если покалечили Вивисектора, при этом Med_Vivisector_counter=>3-2

traits.locale_text: {n}Привычные медицинские перчатки на руках Вивисектора сменили две сиротливых культи, беспомощно висящих вдоль тела. Заметив ваш взгляд, медикарий невольно пытается спрятать свои травмы, шагая назад.{/n}

languages.translation_comment: Если покалечили Вивисектора, при этом Med_Vivisector_counter=>3-2

languages.text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Руки вивисектора сменили короткие уродливые культи. Заметив ваш взгляд, мужчина невольно ежится и спешит отвести взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}
{n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}
{n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}かつては腕があった場所が、今は短い醜い切り株になっている。あなたの視線を察知して、彼は身じろぎをし、目をそらす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}かつては腕があった場所が、今は短い醜い切り株になっている。あなたの視線を察知して、彼は身じろぎをし、目をそらす。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dirikesimci'nin kollarının olduğu yerde şimdi iki kısa, çirkin güdük var. Bakışlarını fark edince irkiliyor ve gözlerini kaçırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dirikesimci'nin kollarının olduğu yerde şimdi iki kısa, çirkin güdük var. Bakışlarını fark edince irkiliyor ve gözlerini kaçırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El vivisector ahora tiene dos muñones cortos y feos donde estaban sus brazos. Al ver tu mirada, se encoge y aparta la vista.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El vivisector ahora tiene dos muñones cortos y feos donde estaban sus brazos. Al ver tu mirada, se encoge y aparta la vista.{/n}

languages.text: {n}解剖者原本的双臂现在只剩两截丑陋短小的残肢。见你看他，他瑟缩了一下，避开目光。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}解剖者原本的双臂现在只剩两截丑陋短小的残肢。见你看他，他瑟缩了一下，避开目光。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vivisecteur a maintenant deux moignons disgracieux à la place des bras. Lorsqu'il remarque que vous les regardez, il tressaille et détourne les yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vivisecteur a maintenant deux moignons disgracieux à la place des bras. Lorsqu'il remarque que vous les regardez, il tressaille et détourne les yeux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Vivisektor hat anstelle seiner Arme jetzt zwei kurze, hässliche Stümpfe. Er bemerkt deinen Blick, zuckt zusammen und wendet sich ab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector now has two short, ugly stumps where his arms used to be. Noticing your gaze, he flinches and averts his eyes.{/n}
